projects.title: Automata Toolkit - Interactive Computational Simulator
projects.challenge: Computer science students and educators require responsive, interactive tools to simulate, analyze, and convert Finite Automata (DFA, NFA, e-NFA) and Regular Expressions without server-side lag or complex setup.
projects.solution: Engineered a client-side web application using ES6 modules and D3.js force-directed graphs. Integrated step-by-step tape simulation, conversions (e-NFA to NFA, NFA to DFA), DFA minimization, and BFS Cartesian product equivalence testing.
projects.outcome: Delivered a zero-dependency, static frontend toolkit used by students to study computation theory, complying with strict JSDoc typing standards.
projects.feedback: A comprehensive computational toolkit that visualizes automata transitions and converts regex in real-time.

projects.title: IIT Exchange - Secure Institutional Campus Marketplace
projects.challenge: Campus members at IIT Dharwad required a secure, verified portal to buy, sell, and manage academic and lifestyle assets without public exposure or unauthorized external listings.
projects.solution: Built a React 19 SPA powered by Vite, Tailwind CSS 4.0, and Framer Motion. Configured a secure Node.js/Express API gateway, Firebase Authentication restricted to '@iitdh.ac.in' domains, and Firestore databases.
projects.outcome: Launched an exclusive, high-performance marketplace enabling campus members to securely trade assets with real-time updates and media optimization.
projects.feedback: Tactile bottom navigation, snappy spring transition animations, and secure domain controls make this the perfect campus marketplace.

projects.title: Aegis Finance - Chartered Accountant Firm Template
projects.challenge: Accounting and CA firms require a highly professional corporate web presence that showcases compliance services while offering clients useful, interactive tools to drive initial engagement and lead generation.
projects.solution: Engineered a premium, gold-and-navy themed landing page template containing interactive components: a live-calculating GST & Tax Calculator, and a simulated financial rates web scraper widget.
projects.outcome: Created a modular, reusable template that illustrates high-fidelity financial services branding and reduces onboarding friction for tax clients.

projects.title: I W & Associates - Corporate CA Firm Website
projects.challenge: A modern multidisciplinary Chartered Accountancy firm required an enterprise-grade web presence that matches Big 4 design standards to attract Indian SMEs and corporate clients.
projects.solution: Built a premium corporate website using a clean white, navy, and gold theme. Populated all 10 standard homepage sections, adding a floating WhatsApp button and interactive FAQ accordion widgets.
projects.outcome: Delivered a high-end corporate landing page template that projects deep compliance expertise and makes professional services approachable for growing businesses.

projects.title: Apex Career Academy - Premium Coaching Portal
projects.challenge: Coaching institutes require a highly interactive website that showcases training programs, highlights prominent mentors, and offers tools like payment calculators to convert student leads.
projects.solution: Developed a premium, modular coaching portal featuring interactive program cards, an interactive tuition EMI calculator, a floating WhatsApp inquiry badge, and dynamic FAQ accordions.
projects.outcome: Created an enterprise-standard academy template designed to maximize conversions, build brand authority, and simplify program discovery.

projects.title: Vanguard Realty - Luxury Real Estate Template
projects.challenge: Real estate brokerages require a highly engaging, visually rich website that showcases properties, lists expert agents, and provides interactive tools like mortgage calculators to convert buyers.
projects.solution: Engineered a luxury real estate landing page template using a charcoal, gold, and white theme. Integrated interactive property filters, a mortgage/EMI calculator, virtual tour promotions, and custom contact forms.
projects.outcome: Delivered a premium property brokerage template that highlights luxury listings and simplifies lead collection for high-value transactions.

projects.title: Probox Interiors - Premium Modular Kitchen & Interior Design Studio Template
projects.challenge: Modular kitchen and interior design studios in Raipur require a professional, visually stunning web presence that showcases their turnkey design capabilities, highlights Vastu readiness, and provides clients with cost transparency tools.
projects.solution: Built a premium portfolio template featuring an interactive before/after split drag slider (comparing raw renders to completed executions), a custom space cost estimator, a family comfort focus grid, and callback request hooks.
projects.outcome: Delivered a high-end, responsive landing page that builds trust with custom carpentry options, Vastu principles, and transparent upfront pricing estimation.

projects.title: Linux Workstation Installation & Enterprise Pro Hardening
projects.challenge: Developer environments require secure, stable OS configurations with registered patching mechanisms to protect source code assets from vulnerability exploits.
projects.solution: Install Ubuntu Desktop LTS, optimize system graphic drivers, register and configure Ubuntu Pro subscription credentials, set up UFW firewall rules, and automate secure workspace backup scripts.
projects.outcome: Configures a hardened development workstation with 10 years of security patch coverage and active system logs.

projects.title: Windows OS Installation & Personal Workspace Optimization
projects.challenge: Standard operating systems require clean installations, storage configuration, and driver alignment to operate without consumer bloatware and background telemetry.
projects.solution: Deploy clean Windows 11 Home/Pro installations, align storage volumes, install certified GPU/motherboard drivers, set up secure local user credentials, and disable tracking cogs.
projects.outcome: Delivers a secure, fast, and optimized Windows desktop environment tailored for everyday productivity.

projects.title: Custom Gaming Emulator Rigging & Controller Optimization
projects.challenge: Gaming enthusiasts require seamless retro console emulator configurations on Windows without audio lag, screen tearing, or controller layout mapping issues.
projects.solution: Rig PCSX2 and RetroArch frontend applications on Windows, optimize Vulkan graphics renderer backends, map DualSense/Xbox controller layouts, and apply scanline display shaders.
projects.outcome: Delivers a latency-free retro console gaming configuration supporting SNES, NES, GBA, and PS2 titles.

projects.title: Ubuntu Desktop LTS Workstation Installation
projects.challenge: A developer client needed to set up a secure, stable Ubuntu Desktop workstation environment for software development tasks and verified long-term package repository caching.
projects.solution: Installed Ubuntu Desktop LTS, configured GPU drivers, optimized memory alignments, and configured local automated workspace backups.
projects.outcome: Delivered a clean, high-performance Ubuntu workstation configured to run IDE compilers with optimal memory stability.
projects.feedback: The workstation is completely stable and boots up instantly. IDE compilers are running faster than before.

projects.title: Ubuntu Pro ESM Workstation Security Hardening
projects.challenge: A developer needed to secure their personal operating system configurations with Long-Term Support Extended Security Maintenance (ESM) to protect code repositories.
projects.solution: Activated Ubuntu Pro ESM security licenses, configured secure UFW firewall rules, and hardened file system permissions.
projects.outcome: Configured a highly secure development workspace with guaranteed 10-year package vulnerability coverage.
projects.feedback: Having my personal workstation hardened with Ubuntu Pro gives me absolute confidence.

projects.title: Windows OS Installation & Performance Optimization
projects.challenge: Clients required a fresh, secure installation of Windows OS on their PCs, optimizing storage performance and workspace configurations without default telemetry.
projects.solution: Deployed clean Windows installations, partition-aligned storage drives, aligned motherboard drivers, and configured custom Group Policies to block tracking.
projects.outcome: Established optimized Windows desktops tailored for everyday developer tools and office productivity.
projects.feedback: The PCs boot instantly and run perfectly clean without all the usual pre-installed junk.

projects.title: Custom Retro Console Emulator Rigging & Optimization
projects.challenge: A retro gaming enthusiast required low-latency console emulators configured on their PC to play classic titles without mapping issues.
projects.solution: Deployed RetroArch frontend emulator, configured optimized gaming cores, mapped controller profiles, and enabled scanline shaders.
projects.outcome: Configured a zero-latency retro emulator rig supporting SNES, NES, and GBA titles on local PC hardware.
projects.feedback: Perfect emulation! Reliving classic gaming titles has been absolutely flawless.

projects.title: PlayStation 2 (PS2) Emulator Configuration & Optimization
projects.challenge: A classic gaming developer wanted to play legacy PlayStation 2 game backups on their PC with enhanced resolution scaling and full controller support.
projects.solution: Deployed PCSX2 emulator, mapped custom DualSense profiles, optimized Vulkan graphics render backends, and enabled widescreen patches.
projects.outcome: Achieved high-performance PlayStation 2 emulation running games smoothly with enhanced resolutions.
projects.feedback: Playing my childhood games on my PC feels like magic. The PS2 emulator setup is absolutely perfect.

projects.title: IIT M.Tech vs. SDE Career Pathway Advisory
projects.challenge: A CSE final year student holding an industry SDE PPO faced a critical decision after receiving an M.Tech offer from IIT Dharwad. They required an objective analysis of IIT's academic curriculum, research policies (such as internship restrictions), and MNC hiring trends compared to practical industry experience.
projects.solution: Conducted a detailed strategic evaluation of the academic structure, faculty advisors' research alignment, and placement analytics (MTech vs. BTech recruitment ratios). Highlighted institutional policy constraints regarding off-campus internships and recommended focusing on active industry SDE growth to build practical software engineering expertise.
projects.outcome: The client gained clear, data-driven decision criteria and decided to accept the industry SDE role to maximize hands-on software development experience.

client.title: HighRadius SDE Intern & KIIT CSE Student

projects.feedback: Thanks for the answer! The details regarding M.Tech project guidelines and internship restrictions helped clarify the situation completely.

projects.title: Evertz Campus Placement Strategy Advisory
projects.challenge: A final-year engineering student needed high-impact preparation strategies and tips for an upcoming SDE campus placement drive by Evertz.
projects.solution: Provided a structured preparation roadmap mapping specific DSA levels (focusing on Medium-level problems) and explaining the combined weight of the technical placement exam and interview rounds in final role assignments.
projects.outcome: The candidate entered the recruitment drive with a targeted study plan and clear understanding of the evaluation criteria.

client.title: KIIT SAP FICO & KIIT CSE Student

projects.feedback: Okk bhaiya. Thnxx! The targeted DSA focus helped me optimize my preparation timeline.

projects.title: Competitive Hackathon Mentorship & Prototype Engineering
projects.challenge: An aspiring student engineer needed guidance to design, develop, and execute functional prototypes for multiple competitive hackathons.
projects.solution: Mentored the student on architectural selection, UI workflows, and collaborative version control. Co-participated in hackathon sprints to provide direct pair-programming guidance and code review during critical prototype phases.
projects.outcome: Successfully built and deployed functional prototypes during multiple hackathons, accelerating the student's engineering and design capabilities.

client.title: GL Bajaj Institute of Technology and Management CSE Student & Hackathon Partner

projects.feedback: The hands-on guidance on architecture and git workflows helped us deliver working code on time and won us valuable engineering confidence.

projects.title: LensCraft Studios - Premium Photography & Videography Portfolio Template
projects.challenge: Professional wedding photographers and event videographers require a highly visual, immersive landing page portfolio to display high-resolution albums, alongside interactive tools like quote calculators to capture prospective client leads.
projects.solution: Built a premium, cinematic dark-mode portfolio template. Integrated custom golden-hour color palettes, a filterable media gallery with animated lightbox zoom popups, and an interactive real-time price estimation calculator.
projects.outcome: Delivered a lightweight, highly responsive creative media portfolio template that builds trust and streamlines booking inquiries.

projects.title: Elara Portfolio - Premium Model & Digital Creator Template
projects.challenge: Independent fashion models and digital creators need an elegant, minimalist online presence to showcase editorial portfolios, statistics, services, and secure brand collaborations in a premium luxury dark aesthetic.
projects.solution: Built a high-end, responsive dark-gold portfolio template featuring statistic boards, a filterable portfolio gallery with built-in lightbox, fictional luxury brand logos, testimonial carousels, and a floating contact form.
projects.outcome: Delivered a lightweight, highly responsive creative media portfolio template that builds credibility and simplifies booking inquiries for models and digital creators.
